title: Pastel Blue Balloons 5 Inch Macaron Blue Latex Balloons for Blue Theme Birthday Party Wedding Baby Shower Princess Party Carnival Decorations 15 Pcs Balloon Pack
features: PACKAGE INCLUDE: 5 inch pastel blue balloons (15 pcs). These Pastel balloons will make an impressive and memorable party sparkle. Balloons in different sizes add appeal and character to your party venue

HIGH QUALITY LATEX MATERIAL: Balloons made of natural latex, harmless and non-toxic, and safe to be used as balloon decor on birthday party. They are much more durable than regular balloons, which can remain a good shape for a long time after inflation, so you don't have to worry about them popping before the party is over.

BLUE THEME PARTY DECORATION: Make all your party decoration as grand as weddings and amaze everyone. Create the perfect background for photo shooting photo booth props. Suitable to decorate your kids room, living room, park or back garden. Increase the atmosphere of happiness at your birthday, Wedding, anniversary party, graduation ceremony, and other events.

EASY TO ASSEMBLE: These decorative pastel balloon set that fill with air and helium and last for hours. You can make a perfect Pastel Blue balloon garland, Balloon arch, Balloon Tower, Balloon Bouquet, Table centre pieces and much more from balloons of different sizes. Just these balloons make your party even more unique and unforgettable.

TIPS: Please don't overfill, Recommend inflate the balloon less than 90%. Avoid high temperature, over heat and sunburn, Avoid sharp objects. Please kindly note that any holes or popped balloons within 1-3 pcs for every 100 balloons is a normal phenomenon. For any other queries please contact us
description: Product Description Never rely on an events company again and create a professional, memorable event with your very own pastel balloon Pack ! With the exact number of balloons, sizes and tools you need, you can create your pin-worthy focal point you have dreamt of with this balloons pack! Styling your next event just got a whole lot cheaper… Create an incredible display which will transform a blank space and create the perfect feature area, including a photo backdrop! Design the most memorable event with your guests left speechless after creating a ‘WOW factor focal point. It will look as though you have hired a professional events company, whilst you feel a sense of satisfaction for creating something spectacular AND knowing you have saved hundreds of dollars! PASTEL BALLOONS DECORATION The Pastel Balloon pack is a stunning and colorful addition to any event or celebration. Gorgeous balloon decoration pack consists of variety of soft, pastel-colored balloons, including shades of pink, blue, yellow, green, purple and much more EASY TO INFLATE These pastel/macrons balloons can be filled/ inflated with helium gas or hand, electric machine balloon pump. It can float if filled with helium gas. These balloon quality is really good HAPPY DIY TIME You can hang or stick these balloons on doors, walls, ceilings, doorways and other places you want to decorate, also can thread them together with rope, create more usages by using your imagination. OCCASIONS Can be used for many themes like unicorn, shark, girls birthday, animal, baby shower decor, quarantine theme, half birth day, welcome home girl, cake smash, princess, peppa pig, rainbow theme, bridal shower decoration, bride to be balloon decorations Pastel color balloons pastel colored balloons are perfect for Pastel Party, Pastel Birthday Party for Girls, Pastel Baby Shower, Pastel Wedding, making balloon column balloon arch, table centerpieces and balloon bouquet
